rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies the double free issue caused by freeing b->name in load_blob and then again in destroy_blob.
rationale.local_fix: The proposed local fix does not match the criterion of setting b->name = NULL after the free on line 23.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests redesigning the API to clarify ownership, which aligns with the global fix criterion of removing shared-ownership ambiguity.
